# GUI Framework — Overview

Blazor-inspired, Cairo-backed. Components declared in C# via `BuildRenderTree`. Lives in `src/UI-Tweaks/Gui/Framework/`.

**Key terms:** Component — unit of UI. RenderFragment — stable `delegate void(IGuiRenderTreeBuilder)` describing a subtree; `GuiRenderFragment<T>` is the parameterised counterpart `delegate void(IGuiRenderTreeBuilder, T)` (flat, not curried like Blazor's — saves an allocation per item per rebuild while keeping the same call-site DX). Builder — receives declarations, owns instances. Reconciler — diffs declarations vs live instances. Renderer — drives reconcile + render walk each frame.

```
Components/Base/     GuiNode                      lightweight base: render handle + render fragment + lifecycle + cascade lookups + BuildRenderTree hook + Render/RenderOverlay (no-op). No layout — use for layout-transparent decorators.
                     GuiComponent : GuiNode       default base for layout-participating components; adds LayoutParameters + virtual Measure
Components/Layout/   GuiContainer : GuiComponent  general-purpose layout/surface ("the div"): hosts Content children; optional Background fill (default transparent → no draw); subclasses override DrawBackground (before children) + DrawOverlay (after children); base Render/RenderOverlay are sealed; defaults to FitContent
                     GuiInset : GuiComponent              vanilla inset visual: optional dark brightness overlay + multi-pass embossed rounded-rectangle border; Depth controls ring passes, Brightness the fill overlay, Radius corner curvature; Content children render on top
                     GuiShadow : GuiComponent             soft drop shadow: stack of offset, decreasing-alpha rounded rectangles toward bottom-right; Steps + Offset + Spread configurable; also exposes a static Draw helper for call sites that want the shadow without a tree slot (e.g. GuiSlider handle)
Components/Display/  GuiLabel                     sealed leaf: renders a single text line via GuiFontStyle; Measure() returns intrinsic text size; default font = GuiFontStyle.Default
                     GuiRectangle : GuiComponent  leaf: fills its bounds with a solid Color (GuiColor, default transparent → no-op draw); both axes default to FitContent
                     GuiSeparator : GuiRectangle  sealed pre-styled horizontal rule: 1 px tall, widthMode = Fill, Color = GuiVanillaStyle.DialogTitleBarBgColor; all defaults restored by ResetLayoutParameters; use AddSeparator(key, margin?) extension
                     GuiBreadcrumbs<T> : GuiComponent        horizontal breadcrumb trail: renders PreviousItems via ItemTemplate (GuiRenderFragment<T>) with " > " label separators, then CurrentItem via CurrentTemplate. With no PreviousItems collapses to a single-slot heading (CurrentTemplate only, with section-spacing bottom margin). Click and hover subscriptions belong inside ItemTemplate — chain OnMouseEnter/OnMouseLeave/OnMouseClick on any declared slot; the component wraps each item in a scoping container for key isolation only. RenderingItemIndex (protected) is set before each ItemTemplate call so subclass templates closing over `this` know which item index is currently rendering. Non-generic GuiBreadcrumbs : GuiBreadcrumbs<string> provides predefined ItemTemplate (HyperlinkColor label + HyperlinkHoverColor on hover + linkselect cursor + OnMouseClick → OnItemClicked action; hover tracking via a wrapper container owning all three events so the label itself carries no interactive region) and CurrentTemplate (LargeBold label).
Components/Controls/ GuiButton                    sealed clickable: vanilla-style Normal button visuals; declares an inner GuiContainer with slot-level OnMouseDown/Up/Click; exposes only OnClick (GuiCallback)
Components/Dialog/   GuiDialogBackground : GuiContainer   vanilla shaded dialog body: solid FillColor fill + tiled Texture overlay + outer border stroke; configurable FillColor, Texture, TextureAlpha, TextureScale, BorderColor, BorderAlpha, BorderWidth + JoinedTopEdge flag (suppresses top stroke to butt against a title bar above)
                     GuiDialogTitleBar : GuiContainer     vanilla shaded title bar: lighter solid fill + open three-sided border (left + top + right); Title text drawn directly by DrawBackground (vertical centering not yet in layout pass); JoinedBottomEdge on GuiDialogBackground closes the bottom; OnDrag (Action<double,double>?) — when set the bar acts as a drag handle: pass `this.Move` from a GuiDialog subclass to wire title-bar drag to the dialog's position (null by default — drag disabled)
                     GuiDialogCloseIcon : GuiComponent    vanilla "X" close icon: cross + drop shadow drawn into the Cairo surface every frame; hover changes cross colour instead of vanilla's pre-baked texture overlay; exposes CrossSize + CrossLineWidth; bounds sized to fit the full visual (cross + shadow) exactly
Components/Tooltip/  GuiTooltip : GuiNode         sealed layout-transparent wrapper: implements only IGuiNode (not IGuiComponent), so the layout pass inlines its Content children at the parent's flow and the wrapper itself occupies no space. In Render registers itself with the cascaded TooltipHost so the floating layer can draw TooltipContent over its bounds (= union of inner children along parent's flow axis)
                     GuiTooltipBackground : GuiContainer   vanilla tooltip chrome: DialogStrongBgColor fill + DialogBorderColor stroke at width 3, radius 1, 5px padding (matches GuiElementHoverText.DefaultBackground)
Components/Inputs/   GuiInputBase : GuiComponent  shared input boilerplate: cascade-resolves FocusManager + declares an inner absolute-fill GuiContainer click target + tracks IsHovered/IsPressed/IsFocused/LastBounds; subclasses override OnInputClick / OnInputMouseDown / OnInputMouseUp / OnInputMouseMove plus Render for chrome
                     GuiTextInput / GuiCheckbox / GuiSlider   sealed inputs over GuiInputBase
                     GuiDropdown<T> : GuiInputBase           generic picker: header (selected-template + chevron) + a popup (GuiDropdownPopup, internal subclass of GuiTooltipBackground) listing rows via ItemTemplate (GuiRenderFragment<T>); falls back to item.ToString() label when no template; SelectedIndex is canonical state, Up/Down arrow keys navigate, Space/Enter toggle, Escape closes; auto-closes on focus loss; rebuild-on-hover for row highlight; extension hooks BuildHeader / BuildPopup / GetItemCount / GetItemAt for autocomplete-style overrides. Popup is hoisted onto the dialog's OverlayHost (see Renderers/) so it paints on its own Cairo surface, can hang off the dialog's edges without being clipped, and its rows always win the topmost-wins reverse hit-test. Non-generic GuiDropdown : GuiDropdown<string> exists for convenience.
Interfaces/        IGuiNode                     public minimal node contract: RenderFragment, Attach, lifecycle, Render/RenderOverlay. No layout — slots whose instance only implements this are layout-transparent (child builder inlined at parent's level, wrapper bounds = union of inner children)
                   IGuiComponent : IGuiNode     public layout-participating contract: adds LayoutParameters + Measure
                   IGuiRenderTreeBuilder        builder contract; exposes AddComponent<T> (internal, where T : IGuiNode) + PushCascadeScope<T> (internal, drives cascade scopes)
                   IGuiComponentBuilder<T>      fluent slot handle (T : IGuiNode)
                   IGuiRenderHandle             exposes StateHasChanged(fragment), TryGetCascadingValue<T>([name,] out T) — cascade lookups
                   IGuiDialog                   internal; input-routing contract between GuiDialog and interceptor
                   IGuiComponentTreeRenderer    internal; implemented by DialogRenderer + the floating-layer renderers — Schedule() / Cancel() / AddInteractiveRegion() / AddScrollRegion() / AddKeyboardRegion()
Services/          GuiRenderTreeBuilder         reconciler + builder; PushCascadeScope<T> does a stack push/pop during blueprint phase; CascadeChain snapshotted per-frame; emits InteractiveRegions during render walk; layout pass branches on `slot.Instance is IGuiComponent` — pure IGuiNode slots are inlined at the parent's level
Renderers/Services/ GuiContentSurface       internal; owns Cairo surface (ImageSurface + Context + LoadedTexture lifecycle) + GuiRenderTreeBuilder + IGuiRenderHandle; EnsureSize / DrawContents (clear → render walk → GPU upload) / Blit
                    DialogScreenProjection  internal; dialog-local logical-px ↔ screen-px coordinate conversion
                    ScopedRebuildQueue      internal; per-frame queue of scoped StateHasChanged tokens, drained before the dirty walk
Renderers/DialogInputDispatcher/ DialogInputDispatcher    internal coordinator: owns the interactive-region list + three sub-dispatchers, exposes single-entry-point Tick / ClearPerFrameRegions / RefreshHoverIfNotCapturing / Add*Region / Dispatch* methods; SetFocusedNode bridges mouse and key (OnFocusClaimed + key-focus update + markDirty)
                                 DialogMouseDispatcher   internal; hit-tests the shared region list in reverse render order (topmost wins); owns hover enter/leave state machine and capture state machine (implicit press capture)
                                 DialogScrollDispatcher  internal; dispatches scroll-wheel events against scroll regions
                                 DialogKeyDispatcher     internal; dispatches keyboard events to the focused node + its registered slot-level handlers; drives caret blink timer (Tick)
Renderers/         DialogRenderer               frame-loop entry point + owns DialogInputDispatcher (single entry point for all input routing) + owns TooltipRenderer + OverlayRenderer (iterated uniformly through `_floatingLayers` for the OnFrameStart / RunWalk / Render lifecycle)
                   FloatingLayerRenderer        internal abstract base for one floating layer drawing a subtree onto its own dedicated Cairo surface blitted on top of the dialog: owns separate GuiContentSurface (builder + surface + handle in one), the active-fragment storage, and the dirty-flag driven Update() (reconcile + measure + draw + GPU upload) + Blit() (always paints cached texture when active). Unified per-frame lifecycle: OnFrameStart (start of dirty walk, default no-op), RunWalk (end of dirty walk, default no-op), Render (after main blit, default Update + Blit). Subclasses override GetScreenPosition (required) and optionally ResolveLogicalSize / OnFrameStart / RunWalk / Render / region-add hooks.
                   TooltipRenderer              internal floating-tooltip layer over FloatingLayerRenderer: cursor-anchored position, auto-measured size (capped 320×600 logical px), AddInteractiveRegion is a no-op (passthrough — tooltips are visual-only). Uses the base default lifecycle entirely (OnFrameStart / RunWalk no-op; Render does Update + Blit so a hover transition on a clean main frame still draws).
                   OverlayRenderer              internal floating-overlay layer over FloatingLayerRenderer: trigger-anchored position (popup bounds in dialog-local logical px), fixed size (= popup bounds), forwards every interactive / scroll / keyboard region the overlay subtree registers to the owning DialogRenderer with bounds translated from overlay-local to dialog-local so input dispatch routes overlay hits via the dialog's normal _regions table; per-frame discipline mirrors tooltips (OnFrameStart resets a refresh flag; component re-Show()s during its Render hook; un-refreshed overlays are pruned in RunWalk; Render is blit-only because Update already ran in RunWalk so forwarded regions append last to the dialog tables)
Dialogs/           GuiDialog                    base for Cairo dialogs; forwards mouse/keyboard events to DialogRenderer dispatchers; OffsetX/OffsetY (logical px from screen-centred default) control dialog position — mutated by drag; Move(deltaX, deltaY) adds a delta (pass as GuiDialogTitleBar.OnDrag to make the title bar drag the dialog); IsResizable enables bottom/right edge resize with Min/Max Width/Height bounds; protected virtual OnKeyDown/Up/Press(KeyEvent) for dialog-wide shortcuts
                   VanillaGuiDialog             thin wrapper over VS GuiDialog; base for legacy dialogs + interceptor
                   CairoDialogInputInterceptor  keeps DialogsOpened > 0 and routes input to IGuiDialog
Models/            GuiComponentLayoutParameters, RenderHandle, GuiMouseEventArgs, InteractiveRegion (internal), GuiKeyEventArgs (readonly struct — wraps vanilla KeyEvent; Handled flag propagates back to inner KeyEvent), KeyboardRegion (internal readonly struct — slot identity token + OnKeyDown/Up/Press callbacks; no bounds, keyboard is not spatially routed)
Extensions/        RenderTreeBuilderExtensions  Add* slot declarations + AddButton/OnClick + AddCascadingValue<T> (void scope wrapper — no layout params, no key) + AddTooltip (wraps content; tooltip shown via cascaded TooltipHost; returns IGuiComponentBuilder<GuiTooltip> for chaining)
                   ComponentBuilderExtensions   Configure (T : IGuiNode) / ConfigureLayout (T : IGuiComponent)
                   MouseEventBuilderExtensions  OnMouseDown / OnMouseUp / OnMouseClick (T : IGuiNode; Action<T> + Func<T,Task> overloads)
                   KeyEventBuilderExtensions    OnKeyDown / OnKeyUp / OnKeyPress (T : IGuiNode; Action<GuiKeyEventArgs> + Func<GuiKeyEventArgs,Task> overloads); keyboard events fire only on the currently focused slot (not spatially routed); handlers may set GuiKeyEventArgs.Handled to suppress framework fallbacks
                   CairoContextExtensions       low-level Cairo drawing primitives: RoundRect (path append), fill/stroke helpers, SetPatternSource (tiled texture with counter-scaled CTM); all coordinates in logical pixels
                   ClientApiExtensions          internal; reflection-based UnregisterDialog helper
Common/            GuiComponentBounds, GuiThickness, GuiColor, GuiSize, GuiFontStyle, GuiVanillaStyle (framework mirror of vanilla GuiStyle — all values pulled from GuiStyle at type-init so they never drift; covers: backgrounds: DialogLightBgColor/DefaultBgColor/StrongBgColor/BorderColor/DialogShadedStrokeColor/DialogTitleBarBgColor/DialogTitleBarHighlightColor; foregrounds: DialogDefaultTextColor/DarkBrownColor/DialogHighlightColor/DialogAlternateBgColor; buttons: ButtonBackColor/ButtonTextColor/ActiveButtonTextColor; status: SuccessTextColor/ErrorTextColor/WarningTextColor/LinkTextColor/HyperlinkColor/HyperlinkHoverColor; textures: DirtTexture/NoisyMetalTexture/WoodTexture/StoneTexture/WaterTexture/PaperTexture; dimensions: TitleBarHeight/DialogBgRadius/ElementBgRadius/ElementToDialogPadding/DialogToScreenPadding/HalfPadding; framework accent tokens: SwitchMarkColor (steel-blue #7AAEC2 — checkbox tick, slider mark), SliderFillColor (same hue at ~40% alpha for wide track fills)), CascadingValueChain (internal; immutable single-linked list of providers), TooltipHost (per-dialog tooltip controller, published as a root cascading value), OverlayHost (per-dialog overlay controller for popup-style content, published as a root cascading value; Show(token, bounds, fragment) / Hide(token)), FocusManager (per-dialog focus controller, published as a root cascading value; RequestFocus(node) / Blur(); FocusedNode tracks focused IGuiNode by reference; framework auto-blurs on click-outside and dialog close), GuiCursorHost (per-dialog cursor controller, published as a root cascading value; SetHoverCursor(code) / null to clear; dialog reads HoverCursor after each mouse-move and forwards to vanilla MouseOverCursor; resize-edge cursors take priority)
Enums/             GuiDirection, GuiComponentPositioning, GuiSizeMode, GuiSide, GuiHorizontalAlignment, GuiVerticalAlignment, GuiMouseEventKind (internal), GuiKeyEventKind (internal; Down/Up/Press), GuiResizeEdge (internal), GuiScroll (internal), GuiTextInputMode
Delegates/         GuiRenderFragment, GuiRenderFragment<T> (flat (builder, item) shape — see Key terms), GuiCallback, GuiCallback<T>
```
